title: Archive Options for Closed Boards
excerpt:
Currently there is NO way to have Folders under Archive to Organize Archived Boards. Requesting the ability to Add Folders Under Archive.

posts.author: mhansen (Michelle Hansen)
posts.cookedHtml:
1. Currently there is NO way to have Folders under Archive to Organize Archived Boards. Requesting the ability to Add Folders Under Archive.

  2. Currently there is only an Automation to archive “Items” once complete, NOT when Entire “Board” is complete. Requesting Automation to Archive when ENTIRE Board is complete (not by Item)
